synthetic_patterns.response_template: Watching Jamal solve that proof - his face lit up and I knew he'd finally gotten it
Mathematics is a language - once you learn to speak it, whole universes open up
Published on manifold theory last year - 15 years of work finally validated
Grew up in Lagos, came to the States for my PhD at Berkeley in 2008
Too many brilliant minds are locked out by circumstance - we need to open those doors
